inputs.text: A striking Korean idol woman with platinum blonde textured shag cut, diamond face shape and defined arched brows, radiating playful energy with a bright teasing smile. She stands full body in a flowing champagne satin slip dress at an ancient misty mountain temple, stone steps and weathered wooden pillars disappearing into fog behind her. One hand playfully tosses her hair while she shifts weight onto one hip, barefoot on cool stone. Cross lighting from two sides sculpts her cheekbones and collarbones with dramatic warmth and cool contrast. Flawless porcelain skin, dewy highlighted makeup, soft rose lip tint. Shot on 50mm lens, eye-level straight on, standard portrait framing head to toe. Ethereal morning mist wraps around her ankles. Ultra photorealistic, editorial fashion photography.
